message:
chore(dependencies): update torch version in project configuration

- Change torch dependency from >=2.5.0 to ==2.5.1 in pyproject.toml and uv.lock
- Ensure consistency across optional dependencies for CPU and GPU configurations
- Remove outdated torch versions from lock file to streamline dependency management

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ dependencies = [
     "tensorboard>=2.16.0",
     "tiktoken>=0.11.0",
     "tokenizers>=0.22.0",
-    "torch>=2.5.0",
+    "torch==2.5.1",
     "triton>=3.0.0",
     "transformers>=4.40.0",
     "uvicorn>=0.36.0",
@@ -80,10 +80,10 @@ explicit = true
 
 [project.optional-dependencies]  
 cpu = [  
-    "torch>=2.5.0",  
+    "torch==2.5.1",  
 ]  
 gpu = [  
-    "torch>=2.5.0",  
+    "torch==2.5.1",  
 ]
 viz = [
     "plotly>=5.18.0",

@@ -180,10 +180,9 @@ dependencies = [

-    { name = "torch", version = "2.9.1", source = { registry = "https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu" }, marker = "(sys_platform == 'darwin' and extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu') or (extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu' and extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-gpu')" },
-    { name = "torch", version = "2.9.1", source = { registry = "https://pypi.org/simple" }, marker = "(extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu' and extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-gpu') or (extra != 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu' and extra != 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-gpu')" },

     { name = "transformers" },
     { name = "triton" },
     { name = "ty" },

-    { name = "torch", version = "2.9.1", source = { registry = "https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu" }, marker = "(sys_platform == 'darwin' and extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu') or (extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-cpu' and extra == 'extra-21-bio-inspired-nanochat-gpu')" },

     { name = "ty", specifier = ">=0.0.1a27" },
